eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 4:02 AM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 7:02 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Statewide AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Austin, Texas. Missing Child is Taelin Calloway Sorrells, 1 year old, black male. Suspect is Taylor Calloway King, 26 year old black female. Call Austin Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. Statewide AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Austin, Texas. Missing Child is Taelin Calloway Sorrells, 1 year old, black male. Suspect is Taylor Calloway King, 26 year old black female. Call Austin Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1..
